title: Elon Musk's warning as Amazon probes AI-linked outages: ‘Proceed with caution’
summary: Elon Musk's comment came after a post from cybersecurity consultant Lukasz Olejnik. The cybersecurity consultant had said, ‘Amazon is holding a mandatory meeting about AI breaking its systems.’

title: WhatsApp launches parent managed account feature: How it works, how to use and more
summary: WhatsApp is launching 'parent-managed accounts' for pre-teens, allowing parents to control their children's interactions while ensuring privacy through end-to-end encryption. The setup requires both devices to link accounts, and a Parent PIN secures privacy settings.

title: iQOO Z11x with 7,200 mAh battery and Dimensity 7400 SoC launched in India, price starts at ₹18,999
summary: iQOO has launched the Z11x 5G in India, featuring a 7200mAh battery, dual rear cameras, and a 6.76-inch Full HD+ display. Prices start at ₹18,999, offering models with up to 256GB storage, and the device supports military-grade durability and 4K video recording.

title: Adobe adds AI assistant to Photoshop, upgrades Firefly with new generative tools
summary: Adobe is launching a beta AI assistant for Photoshop on web and mobile, allowing paid users unlimited generations until April 9. The assistant simplifies editing tasks through voice or text commands, while Firefly Image Editor receives updates for improved image manipulation.

title: Google turns Chrome into an AI browser with Gemini support in India — top features, how to use and more
summary: Google is enhancing Chrome with Gemini AI integration. The feature is now available to users in India, Canada, and New Zealand. The AI can be used to summarize content, draft emails, and edit images.&nbsp;

title: Xiaomi 17, Xiaomi 17 Ultra with LEICA camera setup launched in India: Price, specs, launch offers and more
summary: Xiaomi launched the 17 series in India, featuring LTPO 120Hz displays, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processors, and LEICA camera setup. The Xiaomi 17 starts at ₹89,999, while the Ultra model begins at ₹1,39,999

title: Instagram down? Thousands report issues accessing social media platform, frustrated netizens say ‘whole thing is broken’
summary: Instagram is experiencing access issues, with over 10,000 user reports on Downdetector. The peak of complaints occurred around 8:59 AM India time.

title: China's ByteDance gets access to top Nvidia AI chips, WSJ reports
summary: ByteDance ​is ⁠working with ‌Southeast ​Asian ​firm ⁠Aolani Cloud to deploy about ​500 Nvidia Blackwell ​computing systems in Malaysia, totalling roughly ‌36,000 B200 chips, the ​report ​said.

title: One-fifth of Australian teens still use TikTok, Snapchat after social media ban
summary: The number of 13-to-15-year-olds using TikTok and Snapchat, among the most popular social media ‌apps with Australian teenagers, ⁠fell from ⁠before the ban took effect in December to February, but still more than 20% used the apps, according to a report by parental ​control software maker Qustodio.

title: BESI attracts takeover interest as advanced chip packaging demand surges
summary: BE Semiconductor Industries has been ​fielding takeover interest. The chip equipment maker which has a market value of 14 billion euros ($16.20 billion), has been working with investment bank Morgan Stanley to evaluate the approaches.

title: Musk's X to change verification system in Europe: Report
summary: Elon Musk's social media company X has ​agreed to change ​its verification mechanism in the European Union ​following a fine of 120 million euros, Bloomberg News reported on Thursday, citing a European Commission spokesperson.

title: Anthropic invests $100 million into Claude AI program
summary: Anthropic launched the Claude Partner Network to help enterprises adopt its Claude model. The AI lab plans an initial $100 million investment in 2026 for training, technical support and market development. title: Meta pushes AI model 'Avocado' rollout to May or later, NYT reports
summary: Meta has delayed the release of its AI model “Avocado” until at least May or June. The model’s performance sits between Gemini 2.5 and Gemini 3 from Google. The company continues heavy investment in AI and chips while aiming toward “superintelligence” development.

title: Microsoft's Rajesh Jha, head of experiences and devices unit, to retire
summary: Rajesh Jha, a senior executive at Microsoft overseeing Windows and Microsoft 365 apps such as Word and Microsoft Teams, will retire after more than three decades. title: Amazon plans to move Prime Day event to June from July: Bloomberg
summary: Amazon plans to move its Prime Day sale to late June, shifting the usual July timing. The discount event covers apparel and electronics and links to back-to-school shopping. Rival retailers such as Walmart and Target are also boosting online delivery and competing deals.

title: Ecomm players catching up in qcomm; Iran's tech targets
summary: Happy Friday! Ecommerce players are beefing up in the quick commerce space. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Adobe's longtime CEO Shantanu Narayen to exit role amid AI disruption
summary: Adobe's CEO Shantanu Narayen will step down after 18 years, sending shares down over 7% amid concerns about AI disruption.
